chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Misc. Appeal No. S – 06 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Reference in disposed of case 19.02.2024 Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- On the facts and circumstances enumerated in the reference filed by the trial Court, two months’ time is granted. The reference is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E Abdul Basit
